title: sterigmostemum sulphureum
intro: Sterigmostemum sulphureum, also known as the yellow stembark or yellow stembark tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sterigmostemum sulphureum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
